news_metadata.title: 测试：华为 Mate90 de1 核心器件供货趋紧，终端备货节奏调整
news_metadata.content: 受上游高端存储芯片与射频前端器件交付周期拉长影响，华为 Mate90 de1 项目相关供应链出现短期波动。多家代工与封测企业表示，正在通过加急排产与多线路物流保障关键部件到货。渠道端反馈，部分区域首批备货将从集中铺货调整为分批到仓，以降低库存与交付风险。

level1.reason: 高端存储芯片属于半导体电子元器件，不在所列HS Level 1农业及初级加工产品类别中

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: 高端存储芯片 (high-end memory chips) are core components in computing hardware such as servers, PCs, and data centers.

family.reason: Storage chips are semiconductor components, not computers or video games.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Family匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

level1.reason: 射频前端器件是半导体电子元器件，属于信息技术产品，不在所列HS Level 1农业、食品、动植物等传统商品大类中

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: 射频前端器件 (RF front-end devices) are core components in wireless communication systems, such as mobile phones and base stations, falling under telecommunications infrastructure.

family.reason: 射频前端器件 are key components in wireless communication systems, handling RF signal transmission and reception.

class.reason: 射频前端器件 (RF front-end devices) are key components in fixed wireless communication infrastructure, such as base stations and access points, falling under Fixed Communication Devices rather than mobile or accessory categories.

brick.reason: 射频前端器件 (RF Front-End Devices) are semiconductor components used in wireless communication systems, not end-user fixed communication devices or accessories listed in the candidates.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Brick匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值
